text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's the moment of truth! Time to check the results
of the ticket raffle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
HYAAAAAGGGH! I l-l-looost?! I was NOT
prepared for thiiiis!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital spends the whole day down in the
dumps after losing a concert ticket raffle.
